game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **베어 너클 4(Streets of Rage 4)**: Players control one of up to five unlockable characters in a side-scrolling beat 'em up, navigating 12 distinct stages by moving left or right and using virtual buttons for attacks, special moves, and grabs to defeat waves of enemies. Combat emphasizes chaining attacks into combos, with destructible environmental objects providing opportunities to extend combos or gain items, and players can utilize new co-op moves when playing with a partner in online multiplayer. Progression involves clearing each stage in Story Mode, which unlocks additional characters and content, while difficulty scales through increasing enemy numbers, varied enemy types with unique attack patterns, and boss encounters with multiple phases. The game also features Arcade, Training, and a DLC-exclusive Survival mode with weekly challenges, offering replayability and allowing players to unlock up to 13 retro character skins and activate pixel graphics for a nostalgic experience.
game_info.description: Streets of Fury is a side-scrolling beat 'em up where you fight through waves of enemies across multiple stages. Defeat all enemies to advance through the stage, use combos to maximize your score, and watch out for increasingly dangerous foes. Break objects for health pickups and score bonuses. Defeat the boss at the end to win the game!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right and navigate menus
Space: Attack/Punch (chain for combos)
Z: Special Attack (uses health)
Shift: Grab nearby enemies
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and combat testing. This test validates that the player can move around the stage, execute attacks, and interact with enemies. It tests fundamental game mechanics like positioning, attack execution, and basic combat flow.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test moves the player right across the stage while executing periodic attacks. It alternates between moving and attacking to engage enemies. The strategy focuses on basic combat patterns without advanced tactics, testing core functionality.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully demonstrates movement mechanics, attack execution, and enemy interactions. The player should be able to move freely, attacks should register on enemies, and the game should progress through at least one stage section. Success is measured by enemy defeats and stage progression.

TEST_2.test_description: Complete game win scenario testing. This test implements an optimal strategy to defeat all enemies and complete all stages, ultimately winning the game. It validates the full game loop from start to GAME_OVER_WIN condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The strategy uses intelligent positioning to engage enemies optimally, chains attacks into combos for maximum damage, utilizes special attacks when health is sufficient, and strategically moves to avoid being surrounded. It prioritizes survival while maintaining aggressive combat to clear stages efficiently.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test should successfully complete all stages, defeat the final boss, and trigger the GAME_OVER_WIN condition. Success is measured by reaching the win screen with gamePhase set to "GAME_OVER_WIN". The test validates that the game can be completed through skillful play.
